startFreeDialog.title: Start Growing Your Business
startFreeDialog.description: Enter your email to create your free provider account.
startFreeDialog.disclaimer: No credit card required • Free forever for solo operators

hero.subtitle: The CRM that grows with you — schedule jobs, delight customers, get paid. All in one sunny place.
hero.errorInvalid: Please enter a valid email address

social.trustedSuffix: lawn care pros across the country 🏡

features.title: Everything you need to
features.subtitle: From first call to five-star review — GreenGrass handles the heavy lifting.

customers.title: Customer Management
customers.desc: Keep all your clients, properties & notes in one cozy place.

scheduling.title: Smart Scheduling
scheduling.desc: Drag, drop & done — crews always know where to go.

pipeline.title: Sales Pipeline
pipeline.desc: From inspection to signed contract — watch deals bloom.

invoicing.title: Invoicing & Offers
invoicing.desc: Professional quotes in minutes, payments on time.

dashboard.title: Team Dashboard
dashboard.desc: Real-time view of every crew, every job, every dollar.

signup.label: Sign Up
signup.desc: Create your free account in 30 seconds.

addCustomer.label: Add Your First Customer
addCustomer.desc: Import or type — we make it easy.

jake.name: Jake M.
jake.quote: GreenGrass replaced three apps for us. Our crew loves how simple scheduling is!

maria.name: Maria S.
maria.quote: We doubled our client base in 6 months. The pipeline view is *chef's kiss*.

devon.name: Devon R.
devon.quote: Finally, a CRM that doesn't feel like homework. It's actually fun to use!

cta.title: Ready to ditch the clipboard?
cta.subtitle: Join hundreds of lawn care pros who traded spreadsheets for sunshine.

pricing.title: Grow at your own pace.
pricing.subtitle: From a single patio to an entire territory — pick the plan that fits today, and upgrade when you're ready. All paid plans + VAT.
pricing.trialBadge: You're on the 90-day Territory trial — every feature unlocked.

trial.title: 90-day full trial
trial.desc: Every new account starts on Territory for 90 days. No credit card required.

noDataLoss.title: No data loss on downgrade
noDataLoss.desc: Your data stays. Excess teams are simply locked until you upgrade again.

vat.title: VAT-compliant invoicing
vat.desc: Add your VAT ID in Settings to receive proper EU VAT invoices.

accountLocked.title: Account locked
accountLocked.lockedSuffix: has been locked due to inactivity or by an administrator.
accountLocked.deletionInfo: remain before permanent deletion. All data is preserved until then.
accountLocked.contact: To reactivate, please contact your administrator. If you're the account owner, signing in again will automatically restore access.

verify.title: Verify your email
verify.description: Enter the 6-digit code from the email we sent you, or click the link in the email.
verify.expired: Code expired. Request a new one.

resetPassword.invalidDesc: This password reset link is invalid or has expired.
resetPassword.title: Set New Password
resetPassword.tooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters

changePassword.title: Change Your Password
changePassword.description: You're using a temporary password. Please set a new password to continue.
changePassword.rule: Password must be at least 6 characters, with 1 uppercase letter and 1 number

unsubscribe.title: Unsubscribe
unsubscribe.description: Click below to stop receiving app emails from GreenGrass.
unsubscribe.successDesc: You won't receive any more app emails from us.
unsubscribe.alreadyDesc: You've already opted out of app emails.
unsubscribe.invalidDesc: This unsubscribe link is invalid or has expired.
